codeReview.summary: Pass. The fix feature closes the two prior blocking gaps from supplier-management-improvements by restoring explicit PO lifecycle controls end-to-end: PO creation now persists DRAFT, workflow transition endpoints exist for approve/void/close plus timeline retrieval, transition validation enforces canonical sequencing (including VOID only from DRAFT/APPROVED), and downstream GRN/invoice flows integrate with the transition service so lifecycle progression is consistent and auditable.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Task-based reviewer spawning still fails under this mission due to an invalid configured model alias, requiring manual in-session review execution.

summary: Pass. The lifecycle fix adequately addresses the prior scrutiny failures for PO state entry and explicit workflow transition surface.
